title: Random Chest Loot
description: When you open a new chest, that spawns, its Loot is randomized
body:
# Random Chest Loot
## Description
This Mod will randomize the Loot of chests in structures. That means that every chest that spawns in a village, desert temple, stronghold, etc. has randomized Items.

## Information
ONLY chests in structure, so your own chests are no infected, so no worry. Your own placed chests will not be randomized and they are safe :=)

## Example
![Example Of Village Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e65a80fa50ac022a39aaea14218440169a9c1be5_0.webp)
